subject: I need a refund for my broken headphones
text: Hi, I purchased a pair of wireless headphones from your store last week (Order #45821). They stopped working after just two days. The left earpiece produces no sound at all. I would like a full refund or a replacement. Please let me know how to proceed with the return process.

subject: URGENT: Order #39201 still not delivered after 3 weeks
text: This is completely unacceptable. I placed an order three weeks ago and it still has not arrived. The tracking number you provided hasn't been updated in 10 days. I paid for express shipping and nothing has shown up. I need this resolved immediately or I want my money back.

subject: Terrible customer service experience
text: I am writing to express my deep dissatisfaction with your customer service. I called your helpline five times over the past week and was on hold for over an hour each time. When I finally spoke to someone, they were rude and unhelpful. This is not the level of service I expect from a company of your reputation. I want to speak to a manager immediately.

subject: App crashes every time I try to open settings
text: Hello, I've been using your mobile app for the past month and it has been working fine. However, since the latest update (version 3.2.1), the app crashes immediately when I tap on Settings. I have tried uninstalling and reinstalling, clearing the cache, and restarting my phone. Nothing works. I'm on an iPhone 14 running iOS 17.2.

subject: Question about your return policy
text: Hi there, I recently bought a laptop from your website and I'm wondering what your return policy is. The product page mentioned a 30-day window but I wanted to confirm if that applies to all items including electronics. Also, do I need to keep the original packaging? Thank you for your help.

subject: Refund request - duplicate charge on my card
text: I just noticed that I was charged twice for the same order (#51003). My credit card statement shows two identical charges of $89.99 on the same day. This appears to be a billing error on your end. Please refund the duplicate charge as soon as possible. I have attached my bank statement for reference.

subject: Package delivered to wrong address
text: My order #47332 was supposed to be delivered to 142 Oak Street, but the delivery confirmation photo shows it was left at a completely different house. I checked with my neighbors and nobody has received it. Can you please help me locate my package or send a replacement? This is urgent as it was a birthday gift.

subject: Product quality is not as advertised
text: I bought the Premium Wireless Speaker advertised as having 20-hour battery life, but mine barely lasts 4 hours on a full charge. The sound quality is also much worse than the demo on your website. I feel misled by your product description. I'd like to return this and get my money back.

subject: Cannot log into my account after password reset
text: I forgot my password and used the reset link to create a new one. The email confirmed the password was changed, but when I try to log in with the new password, it says 'Invalid credentials.' I've tried this multiple times and even cleared my browser cookies. My account email is isabel.garcia@email.com. Please help me regain access.

subject: Do you offer student discounts?
text: Hello, I'm a university student and I'm interested in purchasing your Pro subscription. Do you offer any student discounts or educational pricing? I have a valid .edu email address and can provide my student ID if needed. Thanks!

subject: Subscription auto-renewed without my consent
text: My annual subscription just auto-renewed and charged me $199.99 without any prior notification. I was planning to cancel before the renewal date but never received a reminder email. I did not use the service at all during this renewal period. I want a full refund and immediate cancellation of my subscription.

subject: Website checkout page shows error 500
text: Every time I try to complete my purchase on your website, the checkout page returns a 500 Internal Server Error. I've tried using Chrome, Firefox, and Safari with the same result. My cart has 3 items totaling $245. I've been trying for two days now. This is very frustrating as I just want to buy your products.
